body_txt: You see that guy there? They're crawling around on all fours, and... are they sniffing that guy's butt ? Who do they think they are? A dog, of course. There's plenty of Shapeshifting tropes, but this one is different. You see, these characters don't actually change form , they just think they do. This is whenever a character believes they are a dog or any other animal without actually being one. A "Freaky Friday" Flip with an animal also doesn't count. All Animals Are Dogs might be in use if other non-dog animals are under the same delusion. May be caused by Hypno Fool , a Sanity Slippage , being Raised by Wolves , or Exhaustion-Induced Idiocy . If the deluded character is actually good at mimicking a dog, that may be because The Mind Is a Plaything of the Body . Do not confuse with delusions of god hood , which is something else. If they consider themself one animal but are well-aware their body is more typical for a different one, it's Trans Nature . Supertrope to Chicken Hypnosis Gag , for when a character specifically gets mind-controlled into thinking they're a chicken.
